goals.title: Schema anchor: `app/services/config/config_schema.json` currently def...
goals.objective: Schema anchor: `app/services/config/config_schema.json` currently defines `mesh_sharing` with only `share`, `max_concurrent`, `prefer`, and `fallback`.

goals.title: Acceptance target: runtime config, schema, generated defaults, genera...
goals.objective: Acceptance target: runtime config, schema, generated defaults, generated config models, generated keys, docs, and validation tests agree.

goals.title: Treat `allowed_peers`, `min_version`, and `required_capabilities` as...
goals.objective: Treat `allowed_peers`, `min_version`, and `required_capabilities` as supported operator-facing fields because they already exist in runtime policy and mesh negotiation/routing tests.

goals.title: Add these fields to `$defs.mesh_sharing` in `app/services/config/conf...
goals.objective:
Add these fields to `$defs.mesh_sharing` in `app/services/config/config_schema.json` with safe defaults:
`allowed_peers`: `null` or string array, default `null`, meaning any authenticated peer may use a shared service.
`min_version`: `null` or string, default `null`, deferring to global mesh version policy unless set.
`required_capabilities`: string array, default `[]`, meaning no extra capability requirement.

goals.title: Run `make generate-config` so `app/shared/config/models.py`, `app/sha...
goals.objective: Run `make generate-config` so `app/shared/config/models.py`, `app/shared/config/keys.py`, and `app/services/config/config_defaults.json` are generated from the schema.

goals.title: Add a focused config test asserting runtime `MeshServiceConfig` field...
goals.objective: Add a focused config test asserting runtime `MeshServiceConfig` fields are present in the schema, generated model, generated keys, and defaults.

goals.title: Update `docs/CONFIG_SERVICE_PATTERN.md` with concise examples for hom...
goals.objective: Update `docs/CONFIG_SERVICE_PATTERN.md` with concise examples for home LAN, process-cluster, and internet-crossing trust tiers.

goals.title: A targeted gateway mesh/config test if affected by generated models.
goals.objective: A targeted gateway mesh/config test if affected by generated models.

goals.title: Generated artifacts may reorder or format unrelated config code. Miti...
goals.objective: Generated artifacts may reorder or format unrelated config code. Mitigation: inspect diff and keep schema edits minimal.

goals.title: Defaults could accidentally broaden exposure. Mitigation: preserve `s...
goals.objective: Defaults could accidentally broaden exposure. Mitigation: preserve `share: false`; new lists are empty and allowlist is `null` only meaningful after explicit sharing.

goals.title: PER-132 is ready for QA when schema/runtime parity is tested, docs ar...
goals.objective: PER-132 is ready for QA when schema/runtime parity is tested, docs are updated, generated files are clean, a commit is pushed, and a PR is opened.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
